title: Birlasoft International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Birlasoft International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
